headline: Cyclospora Produce Scare Wipes Out Sweetgreen Stock Gains
summary: Sweetgreen  stock extended its dramatic selloff Thursday, wiping out this year’s gains as cases of cyclosporiasis—an intestinal illness linked to fresh produce—keep rising across the U.S.  To be clear, no cases of cyclosporiasis have been tied to Sweetgreen, or any producers, for that matter.  Sweetgreen didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment.

Sweetgreen didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment.

headline: Why Sweetgreen Stock Just Wiped Out This Year’s Gains
summary: To be clear, no cases of cyclosporiasis have been tied to Sweetgreen, or any producers, for that matter.  Sweetgreen didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment.  Before the outbreak gained traction, Sweetgreen had notched a strong start to 2026, jumping 30% in the first half of the year.

headline: What to Expect From Yum! Brands’ Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Investors will be watching Yum! Brands' second-quarter earnings release later this month, with analysts forecasting a low-double-digit improvement in the company's bottom line.
